ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the item or task */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was created */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the task */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the task (e.g., Bug, Feature, Snack) */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the task is completed */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., High, Low) */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was completed */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "assigned_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the task is assigned */,
  "recurring" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the task is recurring */,
  "recurring_interval" INTEGER /* Interval for recurring tasks */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the task */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_item_type FOREIGN KEY ("item_type") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., IT, Procurement, Customer Service) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "item_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type (e.g., Bug, Feature, Snack) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID for the item type */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the item type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the item type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., High, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the priority level */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the priority level */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the priority level was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the task status (e.g., Open, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the status */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being tracked */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task status at the time of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the change */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the history record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the history record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES task_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the item is stored (e.g., soda freezer) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the inventory item */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory item was created */,
  "last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the inventory item */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_item_name FOREIGN KEY ("item_name") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory history record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "quantity_change" INTEGER /* Quantity change (positive for additions, negative for reductions) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the change */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the history record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the history record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_history_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the task is assigned */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was assigned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the task */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assignment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was created */,
  "last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the assignment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES task_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task related to the notification (if applicable) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item related to the notification (if applicable) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., Task Assignment, Inventory Low) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Read) */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the notification */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
